product.title: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Industry Leading Noise Canceling Headphones with Auto Noise Canceling Optimizer, Chat Aware Technology, Alexa Voice Control, WH1000XM5/S Silver
features: Industry-leading noise canceling with Auto NC Optimizer
Crystal clear hands-free calling with Precise Voice Pickup technology
Speak-to-chat automatically pauses music when you start a conversation
Up to 30-hour battery life with quick charge (3 min charge = 3 hours playback)
Multipoint connection: connect to two Bluetooth devices simultaneously
